details.event_name: Nation First Challenge - Adopt Swadeshi Products
details.event_description:
Inspired by Hon’ble Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s appeal to strengthen India through conscious lifestyle choices, MY Bharat (Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports) presents the Nation First Challenge. This nationwide digital campaign empowers youth to contribute to nation-building and self-reliance through everyday actions.

Our current spotlight category is Adopt Swadeshi Products—encouraging citizens to choose homegrown goods to boost the domestic economy. Other key focus areas include reducing fuel/cooking oil consumption, promoting natural farming, adopting work-from-home, traveling domestically, and avoiding unnecessary expenses.

Instructions:

Winners will be selected via a computer-based lottery system   from the top scorers.

Organizers are not responsible for lost, late, or incomplete entries due to network or computer errors.

The organizer reserves the right to modify, amend the terms, or discontinue the event at any moment due to unforeseen circumstances.
